Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 90 -1 68 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I would appreciate it if you could come to the Velvet Room.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 90 -1 68 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}There is a matter I would like to discuss with you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 90 -1 68 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}There is an alternate entrance you may use located in Paulownia Mall.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 90 -1 68 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Well then... I shall be anxiously awaiting your arrival.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Elizabeth is waiting for[n]me at the Velvet Room.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wonder what she wants to talk about...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I guess I should head to Paulownia Mall.[n]{f 1 1}
